title: Open the landing page and see the main site sections
description: This verifies that a visitor can load the homepage and see the core informational sections that anchor the single-page experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page content is displayed
Verify the main informational sections are visible

title: Jump from the header to the Home section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the Home section and view its content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for the Home section
Verify the Home section is displayed

title: Jump from the header to the Subscriptions section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the Subscriptions section and view its content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for the Subscriptions section
Verify the Subscriptions section is displayed

title: Jump from the header to the Hosting section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the Hosting section and view its content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for the Hosting section
Verify the Hosting section is displayed

title: Jump from the header to the Products section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the Products section and view its content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for the Products section
Verify the Products section is displayed

title: Change the site language to English
description: This verifies that a visitor can switch the interface from the default language to English and see the visible text update consistently.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the language selector
Select English
Verify the interface text is displayed in English
Verify the visible labels update consistently

title: Switch to dark mode and see the page update
description: This verifies that a visitor can toggle the site into dark mode and the interface updates without breaking readability or layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control
Verify the page appearance changes to dark mode
Verify the layout remains readable

title: Change the site language to French
description: This verifies that a visitor can switch the interface to French and see the visible text update consistently.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the language selector
Select French
Verify the interface text is displayed in French
Verify the visible labels update consistently

title: Return to light mode after toggling theme
description: This verifies that a visitor can toggle the theme back to the original appearance and the page returns to a consistent light presentation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control
Click the theme toggle control again
Verify the page appearance returns to light mode
Verify the page layout remains intact

title: Move between multiple sections in one visit
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse across several sections in one session without losing access to the site navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header navigation link for the Home section
Click the header navigation link for the Subscriptions section
Click the header navigation link for the Hosting section
Click the header navigation link for the Products section
Verify the Products section is displayed
Verify the header navigation remains available

title: Use navigation, language, and theme controls together
description: This verifies that a visitor can combine section navigation, language switching, and theme toggling in one session without one control resetting the others.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the language selector
Select English
Click the theme toggle control
Click the header navigation link for the Products section
Open the language selector
Select French
Verify the selected theme remains applied
Verify the interface text is displayed in French

title: Switch languages multiple times in one session
description: This verifies that a visitor can switch between languages repeatedly and the UI stays coherent after each change.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the language selector
Select English
Open the language selector
Select French
Open the language selector
Select Spanish
Verify the interface text is displayed in Spanish
Verify the visible labels update consistently

title: Keep theme changes consistent while browsing sections
description: This verifies that a visitor can change the theme and continue navigating across sections without the visual mode resetting unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control
Click the header navigation link for the Hosting section
Click the header navigation link for the Products section
Verify the selected theme remains applied
Verify the destination section is displayed

title: Browse sections after changing the language
description: This verifies that translated labels stay consistent while the visitor moves between the core sections after a language change.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the language selector
Select French
Click the header navigation link for the Subscriptions section
Click the header navigation link for the Hosting section
Verify the visible section labels remain in French
Verify the destination section is displayed
